title: The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier
writer: Ryszard Ordynski, Seweryn Romin, Andrzej Strug
actors: Jerzy Leszczynski, Maria Malicka, Nina Olida
plot: A young married couple is torn apart by WW1. When the news comes of her husband's death, Wanda marries another man, not knowing that her loved one is somewhere deep in the east.
